#  Search for and Filter RFIs (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Use the search tool to further narrow the displayed results. The search tool respects any selected filter parameters and will only search for items within the filtered results.


##  Steps 
#### Search for an RFI
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool from an Android device.
  2. Tap the **Search** bar.  
![Rfi Android Search Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5ce2ea6f6856869cc8b98bc1014a0ba1/946d002b3ac82bafbaf24506da8b7b72/rfi-android-search-rfis.png?fm=webp)
  3. Enter a keyword or phrase into the search bar. Procore returns search results for the following fields:
     * Number
     * Subject
     * Question
     * Response


#### Filter for RFIs
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. Tap **Filter**.  
![Rfi Android Filter Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d70a0f29b532289cac6aadc28c246aef/e7f6e087c3630e647baa911b68c3d768/rfi-android-filter-rfis.png?fm=webp)
  3. Tap on the available filter(s) to apply them.
  4. Tap **Done**.
  5. To clear applied filters tap **Reset**. Otherwise, your filters will remain applied until you clear or change them.


## See Also
  * [View RFIs (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/view-rfis-android)
  * [RFIs (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/permissions)
  * [Mark an RFI Response as Official (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-android/tutorials/mark-an-rfi-response-as-official-android)
title: Search for and Filter RFIs (Android)
description: How to use search and filter options to locate RFIs on an Android mobile device.
